data.body:
GAP_ANALYSIS_AMENDMENT: Add input contract definition.

AC8: Contract defines GAP_CLASSIFICATION input requirements (what gap-classification sub-agent receives)
The contract must specify that the gap-classification sub-agent input consists of:
1. The failing SC criterion text (from completion-verifier output)
2. The completion-verifier failure explanation (why SC failed)
3. Relevant code snippets or file paths from the validation context

This allows the implementing sub-agent to know what to pass when dispatching gap-classification.md.
Verify: grep -q 'input\|receives\|context' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gap-classification-output.md && echo PASS

Source: Gap analysis finding 2 (implicit_assumption: sub-agent input not defined)
